metadata.title: Sneaking Up Mid and Landing a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this quick mid play where timing and sharp aim catch the enemy completely off guard. Perfect example of staying calm under pressure and making the move count.
What’s your favorite sneaky route in VALORANT? Share your best clips below!

Drop your best sneaky plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
